text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation as I move from the sterile calmness of a modern hallway into the vibrant, idea-filled space of an exhibition. The glass, reflections, and geometric order are replaced by bold colors and stimulating words about research and development. I sense the profound tension between order and invention—the controlled quiet of architecture giving way to the lively chaos of new ideas. My mind awakens, eager to explore what it means to connect, create, and coexist with intelligent machines, all while navigating spaces thoughtfully constructed by human hands.
